title: Grief and bereavement review

examination.text: Requires full assessment of presenting mental-health problems and exclusion of physical causes before stress-specific management.
examination.rationale: Supports assessment before applying stress-related recommendations for grief and bereavement review; no decision is generated.
examination.evidence_extract: Requires full assessment of presenting mental-health problems and exclusion of physical causes before stress-specific management.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Loss, relationship, timing, grief response, culture, function, supports, mental state, risk, diagnosis and plan remain absent.
No diagnosis, risk conclusion, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for grief and bereavement review.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
